name: Super Goribei
short_description: Super Goribei is a retro style platformer with small comic like story. Super Goribei is what could be called a pixelated animated mess but with lots of care to the mess all made by the dev. and is right for your faces with this mario clone that now has 46 levels and 2 boss battles for the good of pixel man kind and more to come.
detailed_description:
Update


Added new levels and a boss battle. more updates do to come. Added 40 achievement more will be added. fixed somethings.


About the Game



about the game

This is a classic mario-style game. With a dark and lonely theme set in a colorful or black and white game world.


Goribei's Story Setup

The protaganist is set in a lost and mixed up world where the darkness grabs at everything every night. Feasting at the protaganist and will be a mystrery
that unfolds as you travel the road to find the truth.



the game wuss set for early access but its got released do to a mix up so here is some of the things that will come in updates
100 levels or more will be added
steam achievement
more story
boss battles

Game Info
-Xbox Controller support
-Mario like
-Retro platformer
-pixeleated fun
-Comic like story
-Contorller Suport
-Achievents will be added
-You can help inprove on the game by giveing inpot

-Hot Keys don't have controller support
